h4cc/awesome-elixir

A curated list of amazingly awesome Elixir and Erlang libraries, resources and shiny things. Updates:
View byDAY/WEEK/README
View on Github

Jun 17th

Images

  • gistars2 - An Elixir wrapper for GraphicsMagick command line.

    • Jun 5th

    Books

  • Hands-on Elixir & OTP: Cryptocurrency trading bot - Want to learn Elixir & OTP by creating a real-world project? With Hands-on Elixir & OTP: Cryptocurrency trading bot you will gain hands-on experience by working on an interesting software project. We will explore all the key abstractions and essential principles through iterative implementation improvements. (2021).

    • May 27th

    Third Party APIs

  • tradehubstars3 - An Elixir client library for the Tradehub blockchain.

    • May 15th

    Authentication

  • guardian_dbstars320 - An extension to Guardian that tracks tokens in your application's database to prevent playback. (Docs).
  • guardian_redisstars2 - Redis repository for Guardian DB. (Docs).

    • May 13th

    Security

  • code_signingstars4 - Signing and verifying BEAM files with Ed25519 signatures.

    • Apr 29th

    Code Analysis

  • DepViz - A visual tool to help developers understand Elixir recompilation in their projects. (Codestars122).

    • Apr 6th

    Framework Components

  • phx_component_helpersstars42 - Extensible live_components, without boilerplate.

    • Mar 29th

    Artificial Intelligence

  • Synapses - A lightweight library for neural networks.

    • Queue

  • kaffestars108 - Kafka client library for Elixir.

    • Mar 22nd

    Framework Components

  • phoenix_linguiststars17 - A project that integrates Phoenix with Linguist, providing a plug and view helpers. It looks abandoned: its last commit was on 2015 and its CI runs Elixir 1.0.3.

    • Translations and Internationalizations

  • linguiststars166 - Elixir Internationalization library.

    • Mar 16th

    Date and Time

  • calendarificstars3 - Calendarific is a wrapper for the holiday API Calendarific.

    • Text and Numbers

  • minigenstars12 - Random data generators for the Erlang ecosystem.

    • Mar 1st

    Screencasts

  • Frathon's YouTube Channel - YouTube channel dedicated to promote functional programming, publishing "real world" programming videos in Elixir like "Create a cryptocurrency trading bot in Elixir" series.

    • Feb 23rd

    REST and API

  • mazurkastars15 - Hypermedia API toolkit.
  • SOAP clientstars92 - Hex-documented SOAP client based on HTTPoison.

    • Feb 21st

    Feature Flags and Toggles

  • ConfigCatstars7 - Elixir SDK for ConfigCat hosted feature flag service.

    • Testing

  • mix_test_interactivestars18 - Interactive test runner for mix test with watch mode.

    • Feb 19th

    Configuration

  • hushstars79 - Read and inject configuration at runtime, and in release mode with support for multiple providers.
  • hush_aws_secrets_managerstars17 - AWS Secrets Manager provider for hush.
  • hush_gcp_secret_managerstars16 - Google Secret Manager provider for hush.

    • Feb 16th

    Text and Numbers

  • bitcoinexstars19 - Bitcoin utilities in Elixir.

    • Templating

  • templestars288 - An HTML DSL for Elixir and Phoenix.

    • Jan 20th

    Security

  • Ockamstars775 - A suite of tools, programming libraries and infrastructure that make it easy to build devices that communicate securely, privately and trustfully with cloud services and other devices. Docs .

    • Authentication

  • phx_gen_authstars754 - An authentication system generator for Phoenix 1.5 applications.

    • Jan 12th

    WebAssembly

  • lumenstars2.4k - An alternative BEAM implementation, designed for WebAssembly.
  • wasmexstars144 - Execute WebAssembly / WASM binaries from Elixir.

    • Jan 2nd

    Actors

  • bpestars189 - Business Process Engine in Erlang. (Doc).

    • Applications

  • chatstars16 - A tiny text chat sample based on N2O.
  • exchatstars252 - A Slack-like app by Elixir, Phoenix & React (redux).

    • CSV

  • ecsvstars0 - Fast libcsv-based stream parser for Elixir.

    • Frameworks

  • n2ostars1.3k - Distributed Application Server.
  • nitrostars37 - Nitrogen-compatible Web Framework.

    • ORM and Datamapping

  • kvsstars162 - Erlang Abstract Term Database.

    • Security

  • castars9 - Certificate Authority.

    • Validations

  • formstars33 - Document forms and validation library.

    • Dec 24th, 2020

    Natural Language Processing (NLP)

  • Tonguestars14 - Elixir port of Nakatani Shuyo's natural language detector.

    • Dec 17th, 2020

    Debugging

  • extracestars27 - Elixir wrapper for Recon Trace.

    • Nov 16th, 2020

    Domain-specific language

  • absinthe_genstars21 - Scaffold generator for Absithne.

    • Nov 11th, 2020

    Third Party APIs

  • ex_changeratestars2 - Elixir client for exchangerate.host API.

    • Nov 9th, 2020

    Algorithms and Data structures

  • flowstars1.1k - Computational parallel flows on top of GenStage.

    • Nov 6th, 2020

    ORM and Datamapping

  • mongodb_driverstars77 - Alternative driver for MongoDB with support for recent versions of MongoDB and comprehensive feature list.

    • Oct 24th, 2020

    Algorithms and Data structures

  • exor_filterstars20 - Nif for xor_filters. 'Faster and Smaller Than Bloom and Cuckoo Filters'.

    • Artificial Intelligence

  • Runhyve - Runhyve is complete virtual machines manager for bhyve on FreeBSD. It's written in Elixir and uses Phoenix framework.

    • Oct 19th, 2020

    CSV

  • csv2sqlstars22 - A fast and fully automated CSV to database importer.

    • Oct 17th, 2020

    Testing

  • Walkmanstars46 - Isolate tests from the real world, inspired by Ruby's VCR.

    • Date and Time

  • calixirstars1 - Calixir is a port of the Lisp calendar software calendrica-4.0 to Elixir.

    • Oct 6th, 2020

    Examples and funny stuff

  • phoenix-ecto-encryption-examplestars173 - A comprehensive example/tutorial showing people how to use Ecto Types to transparently encrypt/decrypt data in a Phoenix 1.4 app.

    • Third Party APIs

  • askimet_exstars7 - Elixir client for Askimet Anti-Spam service.

    • Testing

  • markdown_teststars3 - A library that lets you test the Elixir code in your markdown files.

    • Utilities

  • uef-libstars11 - Useful Erlang Functions Library that provides modules for manipulating lists, binaries, maps, numbers, date and time. It contains some functions optimized for performance in specific cases (e.g. for file I/O operations or binary transformations).

    • ORM and Datamapping

  • ecto_psql_extrasstars190 - Ecto PostgreSQL database performance insights.

    • Oct 1st, 2020

    Search

  • elasticsearch_elixir_bulk_processorstars8 - An efficient and flexible way to insert into Elasticsearch.

    • Sep 30th, 2020

    Editors

  • Nova Elixirstars8 - Syntax highlighting and code completion for Elixir files (.ex, .exs, .eex) in Nova.

    • Sep 29th, 2020

    Testing

  • moxstars879 - Mocks and explicit contracts for Elixir.

    • Sep 26th, 2020

    HTTP

  • finchstars705 - An HTTP client with a focus on performance, built on top of Mint and NimblePool.

    • Sep 25th, 2020

    YAML

  • ymlrstars7 - A YAML encoder for Elixir.

    • Sep 15th, 2020

    Cloud Infrastructure and Management

  • k8sstars173 - Kubernetes Elixir client with CRD support, multi-cluster support, pluggable auth, and configurable middleware.

    • Sep 8th, 2020

    Testing

  • definjectstars38 - Unobtrusive dependency injector for Elixir.

    • Aug 31st, 2020

    Miscellaneous

  • expyplotstars21 - Elixir interface for Plotting/Graphing library using matplotlib.pyplot.

    • Aug 14th, 2020

    Geolocation

  • wheretzstars7 - Elixir version of Ruby gem for lookup of timezone by georgraphic coordinates.

    • Aug 11th, 2020

    Geolocation

  • geohash_nifstars1 - Drop in replacement for Geohash encode/decode library implemented as a NIF.

    • Jul 20th, 2020

    XML

  • elixir-map-to-xmlstars1 - Converts an Elixir map to an XML document.
  • elixir-xml-to-mapstars33 - Creates an Elixir Map data structure from an XML string.

    • Jul 18th, 2020

    Examples and funny stuff

  • phoenix-chat-examplestars466 - A step-by-step example/tutorial for building a Chat app in Phoenix for complete beginners. Covers testing, docs and deployement. Phoenix 1.5.3.
  • phoenix-liveview-counter-tutorialstars138 - complete beginners step-by-step tutorial building a real time counter in Phoenix 1.5.3 and LiveView 0.14.1.
  • phoenix-todo-list-tutorialstars68 - A complete beginners step-by-step tutorial for building a Todo List from scratch in Phoenix 1.5.3.

    • Jul 9th, 2020

    Documentation

  • xcribestars44 - Generate API documentation from tests using Swagger (OpenAPI) or API Blueprint specification.

    • Jul 5th, 2020

    Third Party APIs

  • telegexstars34 - Telegram bot library for Elixir.

    • Jun 22nd, 2020

    Files and Directories

  • wafflestars429 - Flexible file upload and attachment library for Elixir.

    • Jun 21st, 2020

    ORM and Datamapping

  • pillarstars31 - Clickhouse HTTP based client.

    • Jun 20th, 2020

    Text and Numbers

  • smilestars3 - Small lib for converting emoji mappers to emoji characters, like in Slack messages.

    • Date and Time

  • emojiclockstars3 - An Elixir module for giving you an emoji clock for a given hour.

    • Jun 10th, 2020

    Books

  • Programming Elixir 1.6 - The book provides introduction to functional and concurrent programming with Elixir by Dave Thomas (2014).
  • Programming Phoenix 1.4 - Definitive guide to build web applications with the Phoenix framework by Chris McCord, José Valim and Bruce Tate (2015).
  • Études for Elixir - A collection of exercises to program in Elixir by J. David Eisenberg (2013) (Github Repostars501).

    • May 28th, 2020

    Framework Components

  • surfacestars1.2k - A server-side rendering component library for Phoenix.

    • Queue

  • broadwaystars1.4k - Concurrent and multi-stage data ingestion and data processing with Elixir.

    • May 19th, 2020

    Applications

  • workbenchstars67 - From Idea to Execution - Manage your trading operation across a globally distributed cluster.
  • Taistars281 - A composable, real time, cryptocurrency market data and trade execution toolkit.

    • Macros

  • pathexstars38 - Zero-dependency, blazing fast functional lenses.

    • PDF

  • chromic_pdfstars85 - A client for Chrome's DevTools API to generate PDFs (HTML to PDF).
  • pdf_generatorstars253 - A simple wrapper for wkhtmltopdf or puppeteer (HTML to PDF) for use in Elixir projects.
  • puppeteer_pdfstars82 - Another wrapper around puppeteer (HTML to PDF) for use in Elixir projects.

    • Email

  • swooshstars967 - Compose, deliver and test your Emails (with attachments!) easily in Elixir with adapters for SMTP, Sendgrid, Mandrill, Mailgun, Postmark and lots others, plus Phoenix integration with mailbox preview.

    • Lexical analysis

  • abnf_parsecstars30 - ABNF in and parser out.

    • Framework Components

  • recaptchastars92 - A simple reCaptcha 2 library for Elixir applications.

    • ORM and Datamapping

  • barrel_exstars0 - Barrel-db distributed document-oriented database REST client in Elixir.

    • Networking

  • hadesstars19 - A wrapper for NMAP written in Elixir.

    • Queue

  • flumestars31 - A blazing fast job processing system backed by GenStage & Redis.

    • Instrumenting / Monitoring

  • wobserverstars906 - Web based metrics, monitoring, and observer.

    • Authentication

  • elixir_auth_googlestars53 - The simplest way to add Google OAuth authentication ("Sign in with Google") to your Elixir/Phoenix app.

    • Feb 7th, 2020

    Authentication

  • zachaeusstars11 - An easy to use licensing system, based on asymmetric cryptography.

    • Frameworks

  • RIGstars471 - Create low-latency, interactive user experiences for stateless microservices.

    • Queue

  • obanstars1.7k - Robust asynchronous job processor powered by Elixir and modern PostgreSQL.

    • Jan 31st, 2020

    Reading

  • Elixir vs Ruby | How Switching To Elixir Made Our Team Better - Long-form post that explains in detail when and why you should choose Elixir over Ruby.

    • Oct 9th, 2019

    Applications

  • Igthornstars74 - Cryptocurrecy trading platform / trading bot with admin panel.

    • Oct 8th, 2019

    Games

  • Binbostars64 - A chess representation written in Erlang using Bitboards, ready for use on game servers.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Apexstars267 - Awesome Print for Elixir.

    • Oct 6th, 2019

    Miscellaneous

  • AlloyCIstars274 - AlloyCI is a Continuous Integration, Deployment, and Delivery coordinator, written in Elixir, that takes advantage of the GitLab CI Runner, and its capabilities as executor, to prepare and run your pipelines.
  • Jisho-Elixirstars20 - An API wrapper for Jisho.org, an online Japanese dictionary. Allows users to search by word, symbol, and or tags (refer to docs).
  • epub_cover_extractorstars4 - Extract cover from EPUB files.

    • Static Page Generation

  • medusastars3 - Elixir static site generator that supports Pug.

    • Third Party APIs

  • conektastars14 - Elixir wrapper for Conekta API.

    • Applications

  • CaptainFactstars153 - A collaborative, real-time video fact-checking platform. (Docs).
  • Exonstars22 - A “mess manager” developed in Elixir and provides a simple API to manage & document your stuff. (Docs).
  • medusa_serverstars5 - A simple cowboy web server written in Elixir to stack images. (Docs).

    • Artificial Intelligence

  • Exnnstars94 - Evolutive Neural Networks framework à la G.Sher written in Elixir. (Docs).
  • Neat-Ex - An Elixir implementation of the NEAT algorithm. (Docs).

    • Authentication

  • coherencestars1.2k - Coherence is a full featured, configurable authentication system for Phoenix. (Docs).
  • guardianstars3.1k - An authentication framework for use with Elixir applications. (Docs).

    • Authorization

  • canarystars448 - An authorization library for Elixir applications that restricts what resources the current user is allowed to access. (Docs).
  • terminatorstars48 - Database based authorization (ACL), with custom DSL rules for requiring needed permissions. (Docs).

    • Chatting

  • hedwigstars609 - XMPP Client/Bot Framework for Elixir.(Docs).
  • ExGramstars103 - a library to build Telegram Bots, you can use the low-level methods and models or use the really opinionated framework included. (Docs).

    • Cloud Infrastructure and Management

  • erlcloudstars637 - Cloud Computing library for Erlang (Amazon EC2, S3, SQS, SimpleDB, Mechanical Turk, ELB). (Docs).
  • libclusterstars1.3k - Automatic cluster formation/healing for Elixir applications.(Docs).

    • Code Analysis

  • credostars3.9k - A static code analysis tool with a focus on code consistency and teaching Elixir. (Docs).
  • dialyxirstars1.3k - Mix tasks to simplify use of Dialyzer in Elixir projects.(Docs).
  • dogmastars474 - A code style linter for Elixir, powered by shame.(Docs).

    • Cryptography

  • cloakstars425 - Cloak makes it easy to use encryption with Ecto.(Docs).
  • comeoninstars1.2k - Password hashing (argon2, bcrypt, pbkdf2_sha512) library for Elixir.(https://hexdocs.pm/comeonin/api-reference.html).
  • ex_cryptostars91 - Elixir wrapper for Erlang crypto and public_key modules. Provides sensible defaults for many crypto functions to make them easier to use.(Docs).

    • Framework Components

  • access passstars73 - Authentication framework that can be used with or outside of phoenix. Similar to Addict but geared towards API usage.(Docs).

    • Date and Time

  • quantumstars1.8k - Cron-like job scheduler for Elixir applications.

    • Oct 4th, 2019

    Screencasts

  • Alchemist Camp - Alchemist.Camp has many hours of free, project-based Elixir-learning screencasts.

    • ORM and Datamapping

  • panoramixstars23 - Apache Druid client for Elixir.

    • Authentication

  • powstars1.2k - Robust, modular, and extendable user authentication system (Website - Doc).

    • Text and Numbers

  • causticstars3 - Elixir cryptocurrency library for Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other blockchains. Includes cryptography, number theory (prime, congruence), and general mathematics library for exploratory math.

    • Date and Time

  • open_hoursstars32 - Time calculations using business hours.

    • Macros

  • crudrystars50 - Crudry is an elixir library for DRYing CRUD of Phoenix Contexts and Absinthe Resolvers.

    • Jul 11th, 2019

    Examples and funny stuff

  • coderplanets.comstars213 - GraphQL api for coderplanets.com built with Phoenix 1.4 and Absinthe.

    • Jul 5th, 2019

    HTTP

  • etag_plugstars17 - A simple to use shallow ETag plug.
  • Crawlystars465 - high-level web crawling & scraping framework for Elixir.

    • Jun 18th, 2019

    Testing

  • fake_serverstars66 - FakeServer is an HTTP server that simulates response and makes testing external APIs easier.

    • Games

  • vim_snakestars12 - A classical multiplayer snake game with Vim-style keybinding built with Phoenix framework.

    • Office

  • elixlsxstars187 - A writer for XLSX files.

    • SMS

  • exsms - An Elixir library for sending transactional SMS - supports Sendinblue, mailjet, msg91 and textlocal.

    • Algorithms and Data structures

  • nary_treestars10 - An Elixir implementation of generic n-ary tree data structure.

    • HTTP

  • mintstars1k - Functional HTTP client for Elixir with support for HTTP/1 and HTTP/2.

    • Framework Components

  • phoenix_meta_tagsstars15 - Generate meta tags for a website.

    • Utilities

  • vert.xstars14 - Elixir event bus bridge to Vert.x services using TCP socket.
  • ex_progressstars2 - A library for tracking progress across many tasks and sub-tasks.

    • Validations

  • ex_nricstars2 - Validation for Singapore National Registration Identity Card numbers (NRIC).

    • Security

  • clamxirstars6 - ClamAV wrapper for elixir.

    • Cloud Infrastructure and Management

  • awsstars229 - AWS clients for Elixir.

    • Feb 5th, 2019

    ORM and Datamapping

  • ecto_shortuuidstars16 - Ecto type which adds support for ShortUUIDsstars28.

    • Feb 1st, 2019

    Testing

  • elixir-auto-teststars1 - Run test when file is saved using inotify-tools.

    • Miscellaneous

  • AtomVMstars862 - AtomVM allows to run Elixir/Erlang code on embedded devices such as ESP32 and STM32 microcontrollers.

    • Text and Numbers

  • shortuuidstars28 - Generate concise, unambiguous, URL-safe UUIDs.

    • Jan 31st, 2019

    Examples and funny stuff

  • hexpmstars809 - Source code for the hex package manager site built with Phoenix 1.3.
  • changelog.comstars2.2k - CMS that runs changelog.com built with Phoenix 1.4.
  • tilexstars422 - Source code for Hashrocket's TIL website built with Phoenix 1.3.

    • Command Line Applications

  • ratatouillestars382 - A TUI (terminal UI) kit for Elixir.

    • Validations

  • optimalstars37 - A schema based keyword list option validator.

    • Debugging

  • git_hooksstars65 - Add git hooks to Elixir projects.

    • Jan 30th, 2019

    Algorithms and Data structures

  • sleeplocksstars37 - BEAM friendly spinlocks for Elixir/Erlang.
  • emelstars74 - A simple and functional machine learning library written in elixir.
  • masonstars6 - Coerce maps into structs. This is helpful e.g. when you interface a REST API and want to create a struct from the response.
  • hypexstars17 - Fast Elixir implementation of HyperLogLog.
  • def_memostars29 - A memoization macro (defmemo) for elixir using a genserver backing store.

  • json_stream_encoderstars5 - JsonStreamEncoder is a streaming encoder for streaming JSON to an IOish thing in Elixir.
  • tinystars46 - Tiny, fast and fully compliant JSON parser for Elixir.

  • cyanidestars5 - An Elixir BSON encoding/decoding library.

  • wait_for_itstars12 - Provides convenient and easy-to-use facilities for synchronizing concurrent activities.
  • cizen - Build highly concurrent, monitorable, and extensible applications with a collection of sagas.

  • mecks_unitstars44 - A package to elegantly mock module functions within (asynchronous) ExUnit tests using meckstars737.

  • ecto_jobstars250 - A transactional job queue built with Ecto, PostgreSQL and GenStage.
  • Rihannastars400 - High performance postgres-backed job queue for Elixir.

  • hammerstars366 - A rate-limiter with pluggable storage backends, including Redis.
  • expoolstars24 - A small process pooling library for parallel tasks in Elixir.

  • tiktakstars5 - Fast and lightweight web scheduler written in Elixir.

  • sobelowstars1.1k - Security-focused static analysis for the Phoenix Framework.

  • texas - Texas is a powerful abstraction over updating your clients using server-side rendering and server-side Virtual DOM diff/patching.

  • sentixstars13 - A cross-platform file watcher for Elixir based on fswatch.

  • firmatastars43 - This package implements the Firmata protocol.

  • elixir-lsstars854 - A frontend-independent IDE "smartness" server for Elixir. Implements the JSON-based "Language Server Protocol" standard and provides debugger support via VS Code's debugger protocol.

  • sshkitstars108 - An Elixir toolkit for performing tasks on one or more servers, built on top of Erlang’s SSH application.

  • RandomStringGeneratorstars1 - A module to generate a random string based on a given string pattern.

  • uri_templatestars15 - RFC6570 compliant URI template processor for Elixir.

    • XML

  • erlsomstars248 - Erlsom is an Erlang library to parse (and generate) XML documents.
  • xmlrpcstars35 - Library for encoding and decoding XML-RPC for clients and servers.

  • erlastic_searchstars155 - An Erlang app for communicating with Elastic Search's rest interface.
  • timex_ectostars155 - An adapter for using Timex DateTimes with Ecto.
  • redstars14 - Persist relationships between objects in Redis, in a graph-like way.

    • Framework Components

  • plug_forward_peerstars21 - Very simple plug which reads X-Forwarded-For or Forwarded header according to RFC7239 and fill conn.remote_ip with the root client ip.
  • airbrake_plugstars5 - Report errors in your Plug stack or whatever to Airbrake.

  • rebar3_eqcstars14 - A rebar3 plugin to enable the execution of Erlang QuickCheck properties.
  • pcstars53 - A rebar3 port compiler.
  • relxstars630 - A release assembler for Erlang.

    • Algorithms and Data structures

  • fusestars417 - This application implements a so-called circuit-breaker for Erlang.
  • exfsmstars6 - Simple elixir library to define a static FSM.
  • blocking_queuestars50 - BlockingQueue is a simple queue implemented as a GenServer. It has a fixed maximum length established when it is created.
  • count_bufferstars2 - Buffer a large set of counters and flush periodically.

    • Third Party APIs

  • feedlexstars3 - Feedly RSS reader client for Elixir.
  • airbrakestars24 - An Elixir notifier for the Airbrake.
  • reporterstars4 - Reporter is simple reporting App reviews library. Support AppStore and GooglePlay.
  • m2x - Elixir client for the AT&T M2X, a cloud-based fully managed time-series data storage service for network connected machine-to-machine (M2M) devices and the Internet of Things (IoT). (Erlang Version).

  • ja_serializerstars622 - JSONAPI.org Serialization in Elixir.

  • connectionstars236 - Connection behaviour for connection processes. The API is superset of the GenServer API.

  • anaphorastars16 - Anaphora is the anaphoric macro collection for Elixir. An anaphoric macro is one that deliberately captures a variable (typically it) from forms supplied to the macro.

  • huffmanstars19 - Huffman encoding and decoding in Elixir.
